figures.caption: Table 2. Top-1 accuracy (%) on OakInkV2 for all fusion strategies compared against unimodal baselines. VideoMamba refers to the pretrained video encoder alone, and Skeleton Mamba to the skeleton-only Mamba stack. δV and δS denote absolute difference in accuracy points, while ∆V and ∆S denote relative change with respect to each baseline respectively.
